comment.body:
aleabitoreddit - Anytime. I just kept seeing the "Fed Chair" nomination cited as the reason for the Silver drop from mainstream media, but anyone who can think independently knows that's not the reason.

The nomination just gives CME/exchanges and banks an excuse to avoid admitting that their own margin hikes to % + hiked requirements forced liquidations. 

That being said I'm not engaged in the Silver market, I just wanted to publish what I found.
comment.raw_body:
aleabitoreddit - Anytime. I just kept seeing the "Fed Chair" nomination cited as the reason for the Silver drop from mainstream media, but anyone who can think independently knows that's not the reason.

The nomination just gives CME/exchanges and banks an excuse to avoid admitting that their own margin hikes to % + hiked requirements forced liquidations. 

That being said I'm not engaged in the Silver market, I just wanted to publish what I found.
